# LoLek – League of Legends ARAM Assistant

LoLek is a smart League of Legends ARAM assistant that helps players make optimal in-game decisions in real time using voice commands and live game analysis.

The application provides context-aware recommendations based on the current game state, allowing players to improve their gameplay without interrupting their match experience.

## Features

- Real-time ARAM build recommendations
- Voice command support
- Context-aware decision making
- Live game state analysis
- Faster and smarter in-game decisions
- No need to browse external websites during matches

## How It Works

The application analyzes the current League of Legends ARAM match using Riot API data and a recommendation engine that evaluates:

- Enemy team composition
- Enemy item builds
- Current game state
- Situational itemization

Players can interact with the assistant using voice commands, enabling hands-free access to useful recommendations during gameplay.

## Example Voice Commands

- “What should I build?”
- “Should I buy anti-heal?”
- “Who is the strongest enemy?”
- “Best item against AP?”

## Goal

The goal of LoLek is to improve player experience and competitiveness by providing:

- Instant contextual assistance
- Faster decision making
- Better gameplay performance
- Seamless in-game support

## Target Area

LoLek belongs to the fields of:

- Gaming Technology
- E-sports
- Digital Assistants
- AI-powered Gaming Solutions

## Tech Stack

- React
- TypeScript
- TailwindCSS
- Node.js
- Riot API
- WebSockets
- PWA (Progressive Web App)

## Future Plans

- Advanced AI recommendations
- Ranked game mode support
- Personalized suggestions
- Multi-game support
- Expansion to games like Valorant, TFT, and Dota 2
